name: vw_customer_summary
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_customer_summary AS SELECT ci.customer_id, ci.gender, ci.age, ci.senior_citizen, ci.married, ci.dependents, ca.churn_label, ca.cltv FROM Customer_Info ci JOIN Status_Analysis ca ON ci.customer_id = ca.customer_id;

name: vw_age_group_churn
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_age_group_churn AS SELECT ci.age, ca.churn_label, ca.cltv FROM Customer_Info ci JOIN Status_Analysis ca ON ci.customer_id = ca.customer_id;

name: vw_marriage_dependents_churn
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_marriage_dependents_churn AS SELECT ci.married, ci.dependents, ca.churn_value FROM Customer_Info ci JOIN Status_Analysis ca ON ci.customer_id = ca.customer_id;

name: vw_customer_details
SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_customer_details AS SELECT ci.customer_id, ci.age, ci.gender, ca.cltv, ca.churn_category FROM Customer_Info ci JOIN Status_Analysis ca ON ci.customer_id = ca.customer_id;
